&Total = 0 &Count = 0 &Percentual = 0 &ProgressIni = serverNow() &IsRetorna = true do 'Atualiza' &IsAtualizaMenus = false &IsRetorna = false
For Each Order EmpCod &Total = &NovaCompilacao + 1 &Total += 1
&Count = EmpCmp &EmpCmp = EmpCmp &EmpBDaudit = EmpBDaudit
prcRodaReorgShell.Call('DEL') //SEMPRE DELETAR
Do while &Count < &NovaCompilacao &Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
Do Case Case &EmpCmp < 300 //VERSAO MENOR QUE 300 jaspiReorg_300.Call(&ProgressId, &EmpCmp, &IsWeb, &IsRetorna, &ProgressIni, &ProgressFin, &Percentual) Case &EmpCmp < 380 jaspiReorg_380.Call(&ProgressId, &EmpCmp, &IsWeb, &IsRetorna, &ProgressIni, &ProgressFin, &Percentual) Case &EmpCmp < 400 jaspiReorg_400.Call(&ProgressId, &EmpCmp, &IsWeb, &IsRetorna, &ProgressIni, &ProgressFin, &Percentual) Case &EmpCmp < 498 JaspiReorg_498.Call(&ProgressId, &EmpCmp, &IsWeb, &IsRetorna, &ProgressIni, &ProgressFin, &Percentual) Case &EmpCmp < 550 JaspiReorg_550.Call(&ProgressId, &EmpCmp, &IsWeb, &IsRetorna, &ProgressIni, &ProgressFin, &Percentual) Case &EmpCmp < 551 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.551' Case &EmpCmp < 552 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.552' Case &EmpCmp < 553 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.553' Case &EmpCmp < 554 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.554' Case &EmpCmp < 555 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.555' Case &EmpCmp < 556 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.556' Case &EmpCmp < 557 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.557' Case &EmpCmp < 558 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.558' 626 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.626' Case &EmpCmp < 627 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.627' EndCase
&EmpCmp = &Count
do 'updateManualVersao' //JDF update manual da compilacao para nao dar erro ao criar campos na tabela empresa EndDo
AtualizaVersao.Call(&EmpCmp)
if not &EmpBDaudit.IsEmpty() and &IsWeb <> true prcRodaReorgShell.Call('CRIA') endif
Exit EndFor
if &IsAtualizaMenus = true For Each Order EmpCod &Mensagem = 'Atualizando Menu Empresa: ' + trim(str(EmpCod)) if &IsWeb <> true msg(&Mensagem, status) Endif
ppJASPI_Rotinas_WSDL.Call(EmpCod, EmpCodSec, &EmpCmp, &ppJaspi_RotinasSdtEstruturaMenus, &erro) If &Erro = 0 if &ppJaspi_RotinasSdtEstruturaMenus.SdtMod.Modulos.Count > 0 GravaMenus.Call(EmpCod, &ppJaspi_RotinasSdtEstruturaMenus) EndIF EndIf ppJASPI_Widgets_WSDL.Call(EmpCod, EmpCodSec, &EmpCmp, &ppJASPI_WidgetssdtWidgets_sdtWidgetsItem, &erro) If &Erro = 0 if &ppJASPI_WidgetssdtWidgets_sdtWidgetsItem.Count > 0 GravaWidgets.Call(EmpCod, &ppJASPI_WidgetssdtWidgets_sdtWidgetsItem) Endif EndIf EndFor EndIf
&Percentual = 100 &ProgressFin = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
sub 'updateManualVersao' &Sql = "Update empresa set empCmp = " + trim(str(&EmpCmp)) do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'RodaScript' if &IsWeb <> true msg(&sql, status) Endif
If &sql.IsEmpty() &sql = &Mensagem do 'Atualiza' Else do 'Atualiza' sql [!&sql!] EndIF commit &sql = ''
if &IsWeb <> true msg('EXE. SUCESSO', status) Endif EndSub

//Tabela Configuracao Imposto &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ConfiguracaoImposto') CREATE TABLE [ConfiguracaoImposto] ( " &Sql += "[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpTbFilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpLctCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpOriUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpDstUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpGruImpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCatCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpDtaIni] DATETIME NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCfoCod] VARCHAR(5) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpAlqMVA] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpAlqIcmInt] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpRedAlqIcmInt] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpAlqIcmExt] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpRedAlqIcmExt] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpDif] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCofins] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCofinsRed] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpPis] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpPisRed] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpIpi] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCstPisCofins] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCstCod] VARCHAR(5) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCstIpi] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCBenef] VARCHAR(20) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpAlqIcmUFDest] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpIcmsMotDes] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpTaxFecop] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpIcmsRet] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpObsInf] VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpAlqIcmStUF] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpIncIPI] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpExcPisCofins] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpIpiEnq] SMALLINT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpAlqInss] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpDtaAlt] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += "[CltSitCod] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsTrib] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[CImpTbFilCod],[CImpLctCod],[CImpOriUfeCod],[CImpDstUfeCod],[CImpGruImpCod],[CImpCatCod],[CImpDtaIni] )) " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ICONFIGURACAOIMPOSTO2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ICONFIGURACAOIMPOSTO2] ON [ConfiguracaoImposto] ([CltSitCod],[CltClsTrib]) " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'UCONFIGURACAOIMPOSTO') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [UCONFIGURACAOIMPOSTO] ON [ConfiguracaoImposto] ( " &Sql += "[EmpCod],[CImpTbFilCod],[CImpLctCod],[CImpOriUfeCod],[CImpDstUfeCod],[CImpGruImpCod],[CImpCatCod],[CImpDtaIni] DESC) " do 'RodaScript'
//observacoes &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ConfiguracaoImpostoObservacao') CREATE TABLE [ConfiguracaoImpostoObservacao] ( " &Sql += "[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpTbFilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpLctCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpOriUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpDstUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpGruImpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpCatCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CImpDtaIni] DATETIME NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[ObsCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[CImpTbFilCod],[CImpLctCod],[CImpOriUfeCod],[CImpDstUfeCod],[CImpGruImpCod],[CImpCatCod],[CImpDtaIni],[ObsCod] )) " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ICONFIGURACAOIMPOSTOOBSERVACA1') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ICONFIGURACAOIMPOSTOOBSERVACA1] ON [ConfiguracaoImpostoObservacao] ([EmpCod],[ObsCod]) " do 'RodaScript'
//tabela SItuacao tributaria &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'SituacaoTributaria') CREATE TABLE [SituacaoTributaria] ( " &Sql += "[CltSitCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltSitNom] VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &Sql += "CltSitCodNom VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "CltIsRedBas VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltIsRedAliq] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[Cltind_gIBSCBS] CHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[Cltind_gIBSCBSMono] CHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltIsTrnsCred] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltIsDif] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltIsPresZFM] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltIsAju] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [CltSitCod] )) " do 'RodaScript'
//tabela classificacao tributaria &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ClassificacaoTributaria') CREATE TABLE [ClassificacaoTributaria] ( " &Sql += "[CltSitCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsTrib] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsNomRed] VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &Sql += "CltClsTribNom VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &Sql += "CltIsRedBas VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsRedIbs] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsRedCbs] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsRedBas] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsTribReg] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsPre] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsExtCred] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsTipAliq] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsMonoPadrao] CHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsMonoReten] CHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsMonoRet] CHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsMonoDif] CHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsCte] BIT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsCteOs] BIT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsNfse] BIT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsNfe] BIT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsIsNfce] BIT NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsDtaIni] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += "[CltClsDtaFim] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [CltSitCod],[CltClsTrib] )) " do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.606' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteDocNcmPre') ALTER TABLE [CteDoc] ADD [CteDocNcmPre] VARCHAR(9) NULL" do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'FilialTipoLancamentoSped') CREATE TABLE [FilialTipoLancamentoSped] ( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [FilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctApvIcms] SMALLMONEY NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctApvIpi] SMALLMONEY NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctCtaFis] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctPlaCodRFB] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctPlaNatCrd] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctRecCod] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctNatRecCod] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [TbLctCstPisCof] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[TbLctCod] )) " do 'RodaScript'
// For Each ORder EmpCod, LctCod //Atualiza a nova tabela // prcCarregaGrupoSped.Call(EmpCod, LctCod) // EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.605' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'LctCodNatCrdPisCof') ALTER TABLE [TipoLancamento] ADD [LctCodNatCrdPisCof] VARCHAR(40) NULL " EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.604' //FILIAL &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilPadPis') ALTER TABLE [Filial] ADD [FilPadPis] DECIMAL(9,4) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilPadCof') ALTER TABLE [Filial] ADD [FilPadCof] DECIMAL(9,4) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilPadCstPisCof') ALTER TABLE [Filial] ADD [FilPadCstPisCof] VARCHAR(2) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
//TIPO LANCAMENTO &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'LctPadPisCof') ALTER TABLE [TipoLancamento] ADD [LctPadPisCof] VARCHAR(2) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'LctCodCtaRFB') ALTER TABLE [TipoLancamento] ADD [LctCodCtaRFB] VARCHAR(40) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
//ajuste base &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIpiBas') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIpiBas] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIcmBas') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIcmBas] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIcmStBas') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIcmStBas] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuPisBas') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuPisBas] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
//ajuste valor &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIcmsStPobVlr') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIcmsStPobVlr] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIpiVlr') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIpiVlr] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIcmVlr') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIcmVlr] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuIcmStVlr') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuIcmStVlr] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuPisVlr') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuPisVlr] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmAjuCofinsVlr') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmAjuCofinsVlr] DECIMAL(17,10) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmPis') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmPis] DECIMAL(9,4) NULL " do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmCofins') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmCofins] DECIMAL(9,4) NULL " do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.602' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Monitor') CREATE TABLE [Monitor] ( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MonCod] VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MonNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &Sql += " [MonValidacao] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MonUltSync] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += " [MonVer] SMALLINT NULL, " &Sql += " [MonSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MonRandon] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MonIsImp] BIT NULL, " &Sql += " [MonIsTef] BIT NULL, " &Sql += " [MonIsNfe] BIT NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[MonCod] )) " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpDirVirMon') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpDirVirMon] VARCHAR(200) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FIimpNom') ALTER TABLE [FilaImpressao] ADD [FIimpNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = " insert into Monitor (EmpCod, MonCod, MonNom, MonIsImp, MonSts) " &Sql += " select B.EmPCod, b.EmpImpPC, b.EmpImpPC, 1, 'P' from monitor A full join EmpresaImpressora B on (A.EmpCod = B.EmpCod and A.MonCod = B.EmpImpPC) " &Sql += " where A.EmpCod is null " do 'RodaScript' EndSub

&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDimLar') alter table produto add [ProDimLar] [smallint] NULL " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDimCom') alter table produto add [ProDimCom] [smallint] NULL " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpMrkCnpj') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpMrkCnpj] VARCHAR(18) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpMrkUser') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpMrkUser] VARCHAR(40) NULL " do 'RodaScript'

&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeMrkUser') ALTER TABLE [Notas] ADD [NfeMrkUser] VARCHAR(60) NULL " do 'RodaScript'
//marketplace &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Marketplaces') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Marketplaces]( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkTip] [varchar](1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadFilCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkNom] [varchar](100) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkSellID] [varchar](100) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkTok] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkDtaVctTok] [datetime] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadVenCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkStsInt] [varchar](1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkSts] [varchar](1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkGuid] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkSession] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkTokRef] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkDtaSynCat] [datetime] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadNfeFilCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadLctCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadCliCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadGrvCli] [bit] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPadTraCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkSellUser] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &Sql += " ([EmpCod] ASC,[MrkCod] ASC)) ON [PRIMARY] " do 'RodaScript'
//mensagens &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'MarketplacesMensagens') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[MarketplacesMensagens]( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenId] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenCon] [varchar](max) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenLong] [varchar](max) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenSts] [varchar](1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenResp] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenDtaHorResp] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenDtaHorPer] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenDtaHorArq] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkMenProSku] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &Sql += " ([EmpCod] ASC,[MrkCod] ASC,[MrkMenId] ASC)) ON [PRIMARY] " do 'RodaScript'
//pedidos &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'MarketplacesPedidos') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[MarketplacesPedidos]( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedSku] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedFilCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedVlr] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedCom] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedDtaEms] [datetime] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedSts] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedCliNom] [varchar](100) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedStsEnv] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedNick] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedCliId] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedHorEms] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedLong] [varchar](max) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedShipSku] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkNfeFilCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkNfeCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedDspDtaHor] [datetime] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedEtqDtaHor] [datetime] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedVlrFrt] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedVlrAcr] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedVlrDsc] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedNfDtaHor] DATETIME NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &Sql += " ([EmpCod] ASC,[MrkCod] ASC,[MrkPedSku] ASC)) ON [PRIMARY] " do 'RodaScript'
//pedidos produtos &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'MarketplacesPedidosProduto') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[MarketplacesPedidosProduto]( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedSku] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedProItmCod] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedProQtd] [decimal](17, 6) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedProVlr] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkPedProCom] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &Sql += " ([EmpCod] ASC,[MrkCod] ASC,[MrkPedSku] ASC,[MrkPedProItmCod] ASC)) ON [PRIMARY] " do 'RodaScript'
//embarques &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'MarketplacesEmbarques') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[MarketplacesEmbarques]( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipSku] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipLong] [varchar](max) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipBai] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipLog] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipNro] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipCid] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipPai] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipUF] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipFrt] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipCep] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipCpfCnpj] VARCHAR(18) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipInsEst] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkShipPesTip] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &Sql += " ([EmpCod] ASC,[MrkCod] ASC,[MrkShipSku] ASC)) ON [PRIMARY] " do 'RodaScript'
//produtos &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'MarketplacesProdutos') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[MarketplacesProdutos]( " &Sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkItmCod] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkItmSku] [varchar](40) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkProCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkProGraCod] [int] NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkProNom] [varchar](200) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkProQtd] [decimal](17, 6) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkProVlr] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkProSts] [varchar](1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkItmStsInt] [varchar](1) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkItmLogVarchar] [varchar](max) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkUrlImgPri] [varchar](500) NULL, " &Sql += " [MrkItmLink] [varchar](500) NULL, " &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &Sql += " ([EmpCod] ASC,[MrkCod] ASC,[MrkItmCod] ASC)) ON [PRIMARY] " do 'RodaScript'

Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId
If (ProgressValue = 0 or ProgressValue = 100 or ProgressValue.IsNull()) or &IsRetorna = false ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Else Return EndIF When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
